text: Explanation: directory contains code use (developed) part project. Software Engineering past two decades, increasing number researchers become involved computational research. Many researchers never received formal training software engineering. Software engineering discipline includes design, implementation, documentation, testing deployment software. lack good software engineering practices can negatively affect reliability transparency software, consequently, transparency reproducibility. Poorly designed documented software can difficult peers understand, use, modify, debug. Additionally, inadequate software engineering practices can lead situation way verify code used generate computational results functioning researcher intends. important recognize vast field dedicated software engineering, encompassing wide range tools best practices can utilized enhance software development. briefly provide pointers improve software engineering practices. Coding Following best practices scripting, functional programming, objective-oriented programming may significantly improve quality code requires training experience. Clean code Write programs people, computers (code easily read understood). Adopting clean code practices helps standardize organize software code order enhance readability. allows developers concentrate core functionality reduce errors. Readability helps reproducibility transparency. general rules: Reduce complexity. Decompose programs functions modules (instead making long scripts). Limit number function arguments length functions. ruthless eliminating duplication (use functions). Always search well-maintained software libraries need, test libraries relying . comment uncomment sections code control program’s behaviour. recipe making software irreproducible. Choose style guide—stick (see example, https://peps.python.org/pep-0008/, https://style.tidyverse.org/, https://web.stanford.edu/class/cs109l/unrestricted/resources/google-style.html) Give functions variables meaningful names. Make dependencies requirements explicit Refactor needed (process restructuring code without changing interface). Write error messages provide solutions point documentation. Code versioning ENCORE based Git/GitHub versioning code code documentation. may worthwhile dive Git/GitHub world greater detail. example: Understanding Staging Area Git branching strategies Perez-Riverol, Y., Gatto, L., Wang, R., Sachsenberg, T., Uszkoreit, J., Leprevost Fda, V., Fufezan, C., Ternent, T., Eglen, S. J., Katz, D. S., Pollard, T. J., Konovalov, ., Flight, R. M., Blin, K., & Vizcaino, J. . (2016). Ten Simple Rules Taking Advantage Git GitHub. PLoS Comput Biol, 12(7), e1004947. Describe software tests performed re-run tests. IBM: many different types software tests, specific objectives strategies: Acceptance testing: Verifying whether whole system works intended. Code review: Confirming new modified software following organization’s coding standards adheres best practices. Integration testing: Ensuring software components functions operate together. Unit testing: Validating software unit runs expected. unit smallest testable component application. Functional testing: Checking functions emulating business scenarios, based functional requirements. Performance testing: Testing software runs different workloads. Load testing, example, used evaluate performance real-life load conditions. Regression testing: Checking whether new features break degrade functionality. Sanity testing can used verify menus, functions commands surface level, time full regression test. Security testing: Validating software open hackers malicious types vulnerabilities might exploited deny access services cause perform incorrectly. Stress testing: Testing much strain system can take fails. Stress testing considered type non-functional testing. Usability testing: Validating well customer can use system web application complete task. tests equally important comes scientific software. Code documentation Write comments code (afterwards). Code/0_README.md Code/doc/AbSolution.pdf Documentation files: [filename; short description content] Code/0_README.md; Project overview basic usage Code/doc/AbSolution.pdf; R Markdown/vignette AbSolution package test code: - Unit tests present tests/testthat/. Run devtools::test() devtools::check(). - Manual exploration results test dataset. Script 0: dev/.R - Golem scripts set-package update information Script 1: R/run_app.R - Entry point launch Shiny app (run_app()). Script 2: R/app_ui.R - Defines Shiny UI layout pages/modules. Script 3: R/app_server.R - Defines server logic module wiring. Script 4: R/mod_ files - module scripts used UI server. Script 5: R/fct/util_* files - function util scripts, organized step used. Description manual steps: - Build document package CRAN: install.packages("AbSolution"). - Launch app: AbSolution::run_app() Relation scripts, user instructions execution: - run_app() calls shiny::shinyApp(ui = app_ui(), server = app_server) launch application. - app_ui() composes interface modules; app_server() registers module servers reactivity. - Module scripts R/mod_*, R/fct_*, R/util_* define UI server helpers used app_ui/app_server. - Code/doc/AbSolution.pdf; explains use application run_app()

title: AbSolution
text: AbSolution interactive tool exploring immune repertoires sequence-based features. AbSolution designed principles accessibility, scalability, flexibility, interactivity reproducibility approachable users customizable different AIRR-Seq studies. vignette offers overview AbSolution’s functionality, guides initialize app data, customize app.

title: AbSolution
text: easy. two lines required. Make sure space hard-drive! can easily occupy quite lot gigabytes.
code: # Load required package library(AbSolution)  # Load Shiny app AbSolution::run_app()

previous_headings: A guide to AbSolution > Launching AbSolution
title: AbSolution
text: Need customized information current step? Check Help subtab AbSolution tab. Looking -depth explanation option? Activate tooltip mode clicking “?” top right corner see explanations option hover .

previous_headings: A guide to AbSolution > Launching AbSolution
what: Setting up the project analysis - Step 0
title: AbSolution
text: 0.Project information tab, define type project, samples, workspace used. need indicate: data TCR BCR repertoire-based. Provide details data, including required descriptive table. Specify folder related files created.

previous_headings: A guide to AbSolution > Launching AbSolution
title: AbSolution
text: can try AbSolution test dataset. small, -sampled dataset 10x Genomics Ig V(D)J sequences CD19+ B cells isolated PBMCs healthy human donor. data, provided 10x Genomics Creative Commons Attribution license, processed using Cell Ranger pipeline. comes Alakazam package. Just click Instead, load test dataset button continue workflow.

previous_headings: A guide to AbSolution > Launching AbSolution
title: AbSolution
text: 1.AIRR-Seq conversion tab, reconstruct repertoire germlines based input. AbSolution works full Fab sequences sequences partially-sequenced FWR1/4. need indicate: folder data located. files must folder. Filenames match indicated previous step. found folder, say ‘Yes’ Found_in_folder; otherwise, say ‘’. Additional information better reconstruct germlines. Decide whether keep CDR3 D-gene segment use D gene information reconstruct . Indicate FWR1 FWR4 partially sequenced pre post-Fab sequence removed. Please confirm pre-visualization sequences correctly parsed reconstructed. lowercase letter repertoire sequence indicates insertion, lowercase letter reconstructed germline indicates deletion repertoire.

previous_headings: A guide to AbSolution > Launching AbSolution
title: AbSolution
text: 2.Sequence feature determination tab, calculate features (physicochemical, composition, etc.) nucleotide (NT) amino acid (AA) levels entire sequence (repertoire reconstructed germline) individual regions. Just click button, wait completed. can take quite time depending dataset size!

previous_headings: A guide to AbSolution > Launching AbSolution
what: ALTERNATIVE: start with previously calculated files - Skip steps 1 & 2
title: AbSolution
text: pre-calculated data, step 0 can select skip steps 1 2. 1&2.Select FBM associated files tab, can load files proceed directly step 3. need specify folder pre-calculated FBM files located. files must folder, filenames match indicated previous step. files found folder, display ‘Yes’ Found_in_folder column; otherwise, display ‘’. can also generate dummy datasets number mutations use negative reference next steps.

previous_headings: A guide to AbSolution > Launching AbSolution
what: Exploring the dataset and filtering sequences and variables - Step 3
title: AbSolution
text: 3.Dataset exploration variable selection tab, can customize analysis selecting specific sequences, variables, groups, ensuring tailored comprehensive exploration dataset. Variables NAs, infinite values, zero variance automatically removed. different steps options inside: Select filter sequences. can choose whether include repertoire sequences, reconstructed germline sequences, . can also filter sequences based productivity, sample, chain type, number replacement (R) mutations. Select filter variables. can choose regions (e.g., CDR3, FWR1, Whole Fab), types sequences-based features (e.g., AA-based, NT-based, composition, physicochemical, etc.) include analysis, exclude specific features. can also work baseline values germline-difference values. Decide want compare groups sequences. , specify sequences type comparison want perform. can specify groups sequences comparison normalize groups per VDJ usage clonal usage avoid overrepresentation. can also apply rules individual samples instead group-level include features correlated groups. Perform calculations Selection set (shown Feature Exploration Clonal Exploration tabs) Exploration set (can use try combinations compare Selection set).

previous_headings: A guide to AbSolution > Launching AbSolution
title: AbSolution
text: 4.Feature exploration tab, can plot filtered variables violin plot observe behavior according selected group field 4 Dataset Exploration Variable Selection tab. can add values dots, select interest, include reconstructed germline sequences (already included) compare values changed since germline sequence.

previous_headings: A guide to AbSolution > Launching AbSolution
title: AbSolution
text: 5.Clonal exploration tab, define clonal definition used. can: Use pre-existing clone definition (Clone_ID) calculate de novo. Select dominance threshold based relative abundance. Identify shared clones samples. Manually select clones interest. clonal definition assigned images clonal feature tabs loaded, able export results Export Results tab.

title: AbSolution
text: Export results tab, running full analysis app (means need generated clonal figures Step 5), can download .zip file follows ENCORE structure. .zip file contains following subfolders: /0_SoftwareEnvironment/R/: Contains AbSolution package version used analysis, Docker file, renv information reproduce everything. /Data/Dataset/: Contains dataset used analysis. /Raw/: Contains sample input files. /Meta/: Contains file information samples. /Processed/: Contains files produced analysis AbSolution (sequence feature information). files used analysis data exploration. /Notebook/: Contains .Rmd file generate figures. .Rmd file generated directly app’s code, capturing domain logic using shinymeta. Additionally, exported, uses relative paths instead absolute paths, making easy knit successfully. chunks parse_input feature_calculation evaluated unless user sets eval=TRUE, used produce Processed files. time efficiency, part skipped producing .zip. various fields along pipeline users can take notes. notes included subsequent notebook results. /Results/: Contains HTML file produced .Rmd file key plots AbSolution. HTML file includes system information package versioning details. can take time load time generate .zip file. patient!

title: Authors and Citation
text: Rodrigo García-Valiente. Maintainer, author.            rodrigo.garcia.valiente+absolution@email.com Charisios Triantafyllou. Author. Antoine van Kampen. Author, thesis advisor.

title: Authors and Citation
text: García-Valiente R, Triantafyllou C, van Kampen (2026). AbSolution: Interactive Feature-Based Analysis AIRR-Seq Data. R package version 1.0.1, https://github.com/EDS-Bioinformatics-Laboratory/AbSolution.
code: @Manual{,   title = {AbSolution: Interactive Feature-Based Analysis of AIRR-Seq Data},   author = {Rodrigo García-Valiente and Charisios Triantafyllou and Antoine {van Kampen}},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 1.0.1},   url = {https://github.com/EDS-Bioinformatics-Laboratory/AbSolution}, }

title: AbSolution — B/T-cell Repertoire Analysis
text: interactive scalable Shiny application analyzing sequence features B-cell T-cell receptor repertoires. AbSolution supports identification visualization variable region characteristics, clonotypes, mutation patterns immunoglobulin TCR sequence data. designed principles accessibility, scalability, flexibility, interactivity, reproducibility.

title: AbSolution — B/T-cell Repertoire Analysis
text: AIRR-Seq parsing: import parse AIRR-formatted sequence data automatic germline reconstruction Sequence feature extraction: nucleotide/amino acid properties, mutation analysis, physicochemical descriptors (Kidera factors, Atchley factors, etc.) Scalable computation: backed file-backed big matrices (bigstatsr) large repertoires Interactive visualization: PCA/UMAP projections, violin plots, clonal frequency distributions, UpSet plots shared clones Differential analysis: variable selection user-defined groups univariate logistic regression Clonal exploration: multiple clonotype definitions, shared clone detection, dominance analysis Reproducible exports: ENCORE-formatted output bundles code, data, Docker environment, rendered reports

title: AbSolution — B/T-cell Repertoire Analysis
text: AbSolution available CRAN: https://cran.r-project.org/package=AbSolution
code: if (!requireNamespace("AbSolution", quietly = TRUE))     install.packages("AbSolution")

title: AbSolution — B/T-cell Repertoire Analysis

title: AbSolution — B/T-cell Repertoire Analysis
text: launches Shiny application. built-test dataset available explore features without needing data. complete guide, see package vignette:
code: library(AbSolution) run_app() vignette("AbSolution")

title: AbSolution — B/T-cell Repertoire Analysis
text: AbSolution guides step--step analysis: Project information — define samples, groups, metadata AIRR-Seq conversion — parse sequences reconstruct germlines Feature calculation — calculate sequence-based features sequence Dataset exploration — filter variables, compare groups, explore PCA/UMAP projections Feature exploration — examine individual sequence features across groups Clonal exploration — analyze clonotype distributions, shared clones, dominance Export — generate reproducible reports ENCORE format

title: AbSolution — B/T-cell Repertoire Analysis
text: AbSolution accepts AIRR-Seq formatted TSV files produced tools IMGT/HighV-QUEST, IgBLAST, MiXCR, 10x Genomics Cell Ranger.

title: AbSolution — B/T-cell Repertoire Analysis

what: Run the AbSolution Shiny Application Launches the interactive AbSolution Shiny application for exploring B-cell and T-cell receptor repertoire data. The application provides tools for loading AIRR-formatted datasets, inspecting sequence characteristics, visualizing clonotype distributions, and generating summary reports. — run_app
title: Run the AbSolution Shiny Application Launches the interactive AbSolution Shiny application for exploring B-cell and T-cell receptor repertoire data. The application provides tools for loading AIRR-formatted datasets, inspecting sequence characteristics, visualizing clonotype distributions, and generating summary reports. — run_app
text: Internally, `run_app()` calls [`shiny::shinyApp()`] start application, using UI defined [app_ui()] server logic defined [app_server()].

title: Run the AbSolution Shiny Application Launches the interactive AbSolution Shiny application for exploring B-cell and T-cell receptor repertoire data. The application provides tools for loading AIRR-formatted datasets, inspecting sequence characteristics, visualizing clonotype distributions, and generating summary reports. — run_app
code: run_app(   verbose = FALSE,   onStart = NULL,   options = list(),   enableBookmarking = "server",   uiPattern = "/",   ... )

title: Run the AbSolution Shiny Application Launches the interactive AbSolution Shiny application for exploring B-cell and T-cell receptor repertoire data. The application provides tools for loading AIRR-formatted datasets, inspecting sequence characteristics, visualizing clonotype distributions, and generating summary reports. — run_app
text: verbose Logical. FALSE (default), suppresses warnings messages app execution. Set TRUE see full console output debugging. onStart function called app actually run. needed shinyAppObj, since shinyAppDir case, global.R file can used purpose. options Named options passed runApp call (can following: "port", "launch.browser", "host", "quiet", "display.mode" "test.mode"). can also specify width height parameters provide hint embedding environment ideal height/width app. enableBookmarking Can one "url", "server", "disable". default value, NULL, respect setting previous calls  enableBookmarking(). See enableBookmarking() information bookmarking app. uiPattern regular expression applied GET request determine whether ui used handle request. Note entire request path must match regular expression order match considered successful. ... arguments pass golem_opts. See `?golem::get_golem_options` details.

title: AbSolution 1.0.1
text: Fixed installation clean R environment: added Additional_repositories DESCRIPTION Bioconductor packages required alakazam (specifically GenomicAlignments) resolved automatically install.packages().

title: AbSolution 1.0.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-04-21 Initial CRAN release. AIRR-Seq parsing automatic germline reconstruction. Sequence feature extraction: nucleotide/amino acid properties, mutation analysis, physicochemical descriptors. Interactive Shiny interface PCA/UMAP projections, violin plots, UpSet plots. Clonal exploration: multiple clonotype definitions, shared clone detection, dominance analysis. Differential variable selection user-defined groups. ENCORE-compatible reproducible export Docker support.
